metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where the custom table will be created.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Event timestamp in ISO 8601 format. Required by Log Analytics.

columns.name: EventProduct
columns.description: Product name: AHV, Prism, or Prism Central.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: ASIM event type: Create, Delete, Set, Execute, Enable, Disable, Read, or Other.

columns.name: EventResult
columns.description: Event outcome: Success, Failure, or NA.

columns.name: EventSeverity
columns.description: Normalized severity: High, Medium, Low, or Informational.

columns.name: EventOriginalType
columns.description: Raw event type from the source (audit_type, appname, or alertUid).

columns.name: EventCategory
columns.description: Event category from lookup or source type.

columns.name: SrcIpAddr
columns.description: Source IP address of the actor.

columns.name: AccessMethod
columns.description: Access method: auditd, API, or browser info.

columns.name: ObjectType
columns.description: Object type: Configuration Atom, Service, Cloud Resource, Process, File, Network, Policy Rule, or Other.

columns.name: SecurityAlert
columns.description: Whether this event is a security alert.

columns.name: RiskLevel
columns.description: Risk level: critical, high, medium, low, or info.
